certified_result.consequence: Z(11,23,3,3)=123 by vertex deletion and a matching explicit witness

description: The unlogged 2026-07-05 SAT sweep was a useful discovery record but was not proof. It has been superseded by deterministic profile CNFs and compressed direct or complete-cover DRAT cores replayed through independent LRAT checking for every surviving 113-one profile.

historical_untraced_session.summary: The original sweep reported every capacity-feasible profile UNSAT or arithmetically filtered, but retained no proof traces. None of those verdicts is load-bearing in the completed proof.
